feedback.text: While the language surrounding this mainly seems to concern children, I personally think that this would benefit adults as well. I am personally really tired of dark patterns, addictive design, and other manipulations strategies being deployed on such a widespread scale online. These days I tend to feel like online services no longer are designed to be useful but rather just waste as much of my time as possible. This doesn't seem like something that benefits the people of our Union regardless of what the industry might say. I understand that framing it around protecting children might help crush arguments about that adults should be allowed to do whatever they want, but I do believe that even adults have the right to be treated as humans, not simple numbers in an engagement statistic. Thank you for investigating this.
